title: DNA Cloud — architecture, plans & enforcement
description: Self-contained visual for the DNA Cloud SaaS design: architecture (portal + hosted MCP server + billing + IdP), the Free/Dev/Pro/Enterprise plans table, the claim->plan enforcement flow, a first-class portal usage-dashboard mockup, signup->plan->DCR flow, billing model, phasing and the open decisions for the owner.
source: design doc do f-dna-cloud (Phase B SaaS) — adr-dna-cloud-saas
